title: Sanitary Pads Drive Reaches All Sub-Counties
summary: UCDP's latest distribution round has successfully reached girls across all sub-counties in Kisumu County.
content:
UCDP's latest sanitary pads distribution round has successfully reached girls across all sub-counties in Kisumu County.

This milestone marks a significant expansion of the programme, ensuring that no girl in Kisumu is left behind due to a lack of sanitary products.

## About the Programme

The Sanitary Pads Programme targets girls under 18 years old who cannot afford sanitary products. Lack of sanitary pads is one of the leading causes of school absenteeism among girls in Kenya.

Through this programme, UCDP distributes reusable and disposable sanitary pads, alongside hygiene education sessions.

## Impact

This latest round reached hundreds of girls across the county. Community health volunteers and school teachers played a key role in distribution and follow-up.
